acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Completion reports require non-empty summary, non-empty changedFiles[], non-empty acceptanceEvidence[], non-empty commandsRun[], non-empty evidence[], and non-empty realWorldValidation.evidence.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: scripts/qd-reports-check.sh requires non-empty completion summary, changedFiles, acceptanceEvidence, commandsRun, evidence, and realWorldValidation.evidence; evidence/m4-qd-report-required-content-contract/negative-smoke-empty-summary.log confirms an empty summary is rejected.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Completion acceptanceEvidence[] objects require non-empty criterion, status, and evidence; commandsRun[] objects require non-empty command, status, and evidence.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: scripts/qd-reports-check.sh applies non-empty nested string predicates to completion acceptanceEvidence and commandsRun entries.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Audit reports require non-empty acceptanceReviewed[], non-empty realWorldValidation.evidence, and non-empty criterion, status, and evidence inside acceptanceReviewed[].
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: scripts/qd-reports-check.sh applies non-empty array and nested string predicates to audit acceptanceReviewed and realWorldValidation.evidence.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Existing qd reports pass the stricter check.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: evidence/m4-qd-report-required-content-contract/qd-reports-check.log records `nix develop -c just qd-reports-check` passing after the stricter validation and this node's reports were added.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Linux validation evidence records just qd-reports-check, just check, and a temporary-copy negative smoke test for at least one empty required content field.
No macOS-specific validation is claimed or required.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: realWorldValidation.required is false and evidence/m4-qd-report-required-content-contract/notes.md records the repository-metadata-only validation boundary.

realWorldValidation.evidence: Repository qd report metadata validation only; Linux validation passed and macOS validation is not required.
